Benjamin is trying to solve the following problem with a ratio table. Fill in the last column of the ratio table to answer the question.

One movie ticket costs $\$18$. How much do $6$ movie tickets cost?

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|}
\hline
movie tickets & 1 & \\
\hline
dollars & 18 & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
